# Wire — Pipe — reliable-queue

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> [`test/stories/wire_pipe_reliable_queue_story_test.exs`](../../../echo/apps/echo_mq/test/stories/wire_pipe_reliable_queue_story_test.exs). Every scenario below is a passing
> ExUnit test driving the real `EchoMQ` surface against Valkey, so the catalogue cannot
> drift from the code.

**1 scenario.**

## Scenario: two items pushed at the head are served FIFO from the tail

- **Given** an empty list
- **When** two jobs are LPUSHed in one pipe, then the depth is read
- **And** the queue is drained from the tail with RPOP
- **Then** the depth reads 2 after enqueue and the tail serves job-1 then job-2 (FIFO)
